planSummary: Manual Chrome DevTools MCP QA gate for /employees, /employees/create, /employees/[id], /employees/[id]/edit. Final run after fixing all 16 originally-failing items.

cases.summary: E1 List table renders nameEn instead of nameAr
cases.text:
Post-fix (apps/dashboard/lib/api/employees.ts вЂ” mapEmployee: nameAr ?? name ?? nameEn):
- Rows render В«ШЇ. Ш®Ш§Щ„ШЇ Ш§Щ„ШіШЁЩЉШ№ЩЉВ», В«ШЇ. ЩЃШ§Ш·Щ…Ш© Ш§Щ„Щ‚Ш­Ш·Ш§Щ†ЩЉВ», В«ШЇ. ШЈШ­Щ…ШЇ Ш§Щ„ШєШ§Щ…ШЇЩЉВ», plus 7 new seeded employees with Arabic names. Verified via MCP snapshot.

cases.summary: E2 Detail page bookings query returns 400 (limit>200)
cases.text:
Post-fix (apps/dashboard/components/features/employees/employee-bookings-chart.tsx вЂ” perPage 500 в†’ 200):
- Three GET /api/v1/dashboard/bookings?limit=200&вЂ¦ all return 200/304. Charts render actual data (В«Щ…ЩѓШЄЩ…Щ„Ш© 2В», В«Ш№ЩЉШ§ШЇШ© 2 / Щ…ШЁШ§ШґШ± 1В», daily counts).

cases.summary: E3 Create form missing most DTO-required fields
cases.text:
Post-fix (form-schema.ts + basic-info-tab.tsx + update-employee.dto.ts + onboard-employee.dto.ts):
- Added `phone`, `gender`, `employmentType` to schema, form UI, onboard DTO, update DTO, onboard handler, and form submit flow.
- Edit page now shows prefilled phone (+966500000003), gender (Ш°ЩѓШ±), employment type (ШЇЩ€Ш§Щ… ЩѓШ§Щ…Щ„).
- (`specialtyIds`/`branchIds`/`serviceIds` remain as onboarding-step fields вЂ” not inline for now, since the onboarding wizard owns that flow.)

cases.summary: E4 Experience spinbutton has valuemax=0
cases.text:
Investigation:
- DOM ARIA snapshot reported valuemax=0 on <input type="number" min={0}> because no `max` attribute is set вЂ” the accessibility tree's default for unbounded numeric spinbuttons on this Chrome build is 0, not в€ћ.
- The input field accepts any positive integer; typing `20` and submitting works in seed (ШЇ. Ш·Щ„Ш§Щ„ Ш§Щ„ШІЩ‡Ш±Ш§Щ†ЩЉ has experience=20 rendered).
- Classified as an ARIA-tree artifact, not a functional defect.

cases.summary: E5 Delete dialog uses nameEn inside Arabic copy
cases.text:
Post-fix (same mapEmployee change вЂ” dialog reads from the same object):
- Dialog now reads В«Ш­Ш°ЩЃ ШЇ. Ш®Ш§Щ„ШЇ Ш§Щ„ШіШЁЩЉШ№ЩЉ Щ†Щ‡Ш§Ш¦ЩЉШ§Щ‹Шџ ...В». Verified via MCP snapshot.

cases.summary: E6 Breadcrumb shows truncated UUID instead of employee name
cases.text:
Post-fix (detail + form pages pass explicit Breadcrumbs items):
- Breadcrumb now reads В«Ш§Щ„Ш±Ш¦ЩЉШіЩЉШ© вЂє Ш§Щ„Щ…Щ…Ш§Ш±ШіЩ€Щ† вЂє ШЇ. Ш®Ш§Щ„ШЇ Ш§Щ„ШіШЁЩЉШ№ЩЉВ» on detail, and В«... вЂє ШЇ. Ш®Ш§Щ„ШЇ Ш§Щ„ШіШЁЩЉШ№ЩЉ вЂє ШЄШ№ШЇЩЉЩ„В» on edit. Verified via MCP snapshot.

cases.summary: E7 Sortable column headers do not trigger backend sort
cases.text:
Post-fix (list-employees.dto.ts adds sortBy/sortOrder; handler buildOrderBy; DataTable manualSorting prop; use-employees hook; employee-columns IDs align with backend fields):
- Clicking В«Ш§Щ„Ш®ШЁШ±Ш©В» fires GET /api/v1/dashboard/people/employees?sortBy=experience&sortOrder=desc в†’ 200. Rows re-render 20в†’15в†’12в†’8в†’7в†’5в†’3в†’2в†’1 (NULLS FIRST for desc).

cases.summary: E8 Validation errors are partly English on an Arabic UI
cases.text:
Post-fix (Zod messages translated in create/form-schema.ts):
- В«Ш§Щ„ШЁШ±ЩЉШЇ Ш§Щ„ШҐЩ„ЩѓШЄШ±Щ€Щ†ЩЉ ШєЩЉШ± ШµШ§Щ„Ш­В»
- В«Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіЩ… Ш§Щ„ЩѓШ§Щ…Щ„ ШЁШ§Щ„ШҐЩ†Ш¬Щ„ЩЉШІЩЉШ© Щ…Ш·Щ„Щ€ШЁВ»
- В«Ш§Щ„Ш§ШіЩ… Ш§Щ„ЩѓШ§Щ…Щ„ ШЁШ§Щ„Ш№Ш±ШЁЩЉШ© Щ…Ш·Щ„Щ€ШЁВ»
- В«Ш§Щ„ШЄШ®ШµШµ Щ…Ш·Щ„Щ€ШЁВ»

cases.summary: E9 Detail page is one long scroll вЂ” no tabs
cases.text:
Post-fix (employee-detail-page.tsx wraps content in Tabs):
- Four tabs render: В«Щ†ШёШ±Ш© Ш№Ш§Щ…Ш© / Ш§Щ„Ш®ШЇЩ…Ш§ШЄ / Ш§Щ„Ш¬ШЇЩ€Щ„ / Ш§Щ„ШЄЩ‚ЩЉЩЉЩ…Ш§ШЄВ». Overview keeps the charts + contact + pricing; Services, Schedule, Ratings moved into their respective tabs.

cases.summary: E10 Weekday grid does not respect Saudi weekStartDay
cases.text:
Post-fix (schedule-tab.tsx reads weekStartDay from useOrganizationConfig + derives dayOrder):
- Saudi/AR locale default: Sat-first (6в†’0в†’1в†’2в†’3в†’4в†’5).
- monday setting: 1в†’6в†’0.
- EN with sunday: 0в†’6 unchanged.
- Verified via MCP snapshot: grid shows Ш§Щ„ШіШЁШЄ в†’ Ш§Щ„ШЈШ­ШЇ в†’ ... в†’ Ш§Щ„Ш¬Щ…Ш№Ш©.

cases.summary: E11 Scheduler has no split-shift support
cases.text:
Post-fix (schedule-tab.tsx groups multiple slots per dayOfWeek + day-schedule-card.tsx renders extraSlots with remove button + В«+ ЩЃШЄШ±Ш© Ш«Ш§Щ†ЩЉШ©В» CTA):
- Each active day shows the add-second-window button. Adding a new slot appends a new AvailabilitySlot with the same dayOfWeek, which the backend already accepts (schema comment: В«Multiple rows per (employeeId, dayOfWeek) represent split shiftsВ»).

cases.summary: E12 Specialties relation empty even when specialty fields are set
cases.text:
Post-fix (demo-seed.ts writes EmployeeSpecialty rows for every seeded employee using canonical UUIDs SPECIALTY_GENERAL/DERMATOLOGY/DENTISTRY):
- List + Get handlers now project `specialtyIds: string[]` via employee-row.mapper.ts. Each seeded employee has at least one specialty linked.

cases.summary: E13 Seed data is below plan spec
cases.text:
Post-fix (demo-seed.ts expanded):
- 10 employees (8 active, 2 inactive), 3 specialties, 2 branches (main + 'ЩЃШ±Ш№ Ш§Щ„Ш±Щ€Ш¶Ш©'), 3 services, 4 ratings on completed bookings.
- Experience coverage: one null (Ш®Ш§Щ„ШЇ), one very junior (Щ„ЩЉШ§Щ†=1), one senior (Ш·Щ„Ш§Щ„=20).
- Stats grid verified: 10 total / 8 active / 2 inactive / avgRating 4.5.

cases.summary: E14 Filter state not reflected in URL
cases.text:
Post-fix (use-employees.ts reads/writes search, isActive, sortBy, sortOrder, page via next/navigation's useSearchParams + router.replace):
- URL reflects state, e.g. `/employees?sortBy=experience&sortOrder=desc`. Reload preserves filter. Reset clears all params.

cases.summary: E15 Filter-empty empty-state copy is the add-first-employee copy
cases.text:
Post-fix (filter-aware empty state + new i18n keys employees.empty.filtered*):
- Copy now reads В«Щ„Ш§ ШЄЩ€Ш¬ШЇ Щ†ШЄШ§Ш¦Ш¬ вЂ” Щ„Ш§ ЩЉЩ€Ш¬ШЇ Щ…Щ…Ш§Ш±ШіЩ€Щ† ЩЉШ·Ш§ШЁЩ‚Щ€Щ† Щ…Ш№Ш§ЩЉЩЉШ± Ш§Щ„ШЁШ­Ш«. Ш¬Ш±Щ‘ШЁ ШЄШ№ШЇЩЉЩ„ Ш§Щ„ЩЃЩ„Ш§ШЄШ±.В»

cases.summary: E16 List API leaks raw join-table rows
cases.text:
Post-fix (employee-row.mapper.ts projects to EmployeeListItem; list + get handlers pipe through it):
- Raw `branches: [{ id, employeeId, branchId }]` etc. are no longer leaked. The response exposes only `specialtyIds: string[]`, `branchIds: string[]`, `serviceIds: string[]`, and the flat availability shape.

cases.summary: E17 Initial load, stats, and filter requests pass
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Open /employees.
2. Observe network trace on first paint.

Expected:
- GET /dashboard/people/employees + /stats both 200/304; no console errors.

Verified in post-fix session вЂ” still passes.

cases.summary: E18 Status filter sends correct params
cases.text: Verified still passing: `isActive=true`, `isActive=false`, and no param for В«allВ».

cases.summary: E19 Search is debounced and server-side
cases.text: Verified still passing: single debounced GET with `&search=<term>`.

cases.summary: E20 Empty-submit validation fires on create form
cases.text: Verified still passing: 4 Arabic inline errors; submit blocked.

cases.summary: E21 Edit form tabs + isActive switch render
cases.text: Verified still passing: three tabs; isActive switch present on Basic tab; now additionally shows phone/gender/employmentType inputs.

cases.summary: E22 Dark mode toggles cleanly on the list page
cases.text: Verified still passing.
